Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead

Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)

issue.message: When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingRight` you should probably also define `paddingLeft` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="15dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:paddingRight` with `android:paddingEnd="8dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_toLeftOf` with `android:layout_toStartOf="@id/layoutRank1"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_toRightOf` with `android:layout_toEndOf="@id/layoutRank1"` to better support right-to-left layouts
